title: Hostile AI & automated evil — production threats
motto: Not theoretical. Observable indicators, statistical detection, destroy with certainty.

categories.title: AI-optimized malware & polymorphic engines
categories.detection: Parent-child process policy + untrusted path scoring — not signature AV

categories.title: Automated C2 & machine-precision beaconing
indicators: Persistent daemon session to same dst
DGA or fast-flux dst rotation with stable JA3
categories.detection: Beacon pattern axis ≥7 + timing entropy collapse on flow key

categories.title: AI-scale phishing, vishing, synthetic identity
indicators: MFA fatigue burst from one ASN
Browser awareness flag on checkout mismatch
categories.detection: Honorability + browser awareness + auth velocity — not content ML alone

categories.title: Autonomous vulnerability scan & exploit chains
indicators: CVE-path probe within hours of disclosure
categories.detection: Honeypot paths + exploit-port DPI + listener surge correlation

categories.title: Machine-speed exfiltration & baseline mimicry
indicators: Non-browser high TX bytes to hosting ASN
categories.detection: Per-host egress baseline + gatekeeper bandwidth/stream axes

categories.title: DNS, DHCP & network infrastructure abuse
indicators: GATEWAY_SHIFT or ARP_SPOOF on router IP
categories.detection: Gateway integrity + DNS query entropy + resolv.conf truth cycle

categories.title: Stacked weak signals — ML-managed C2
indicators: Multiple vectors on single dst IP
categories.detection: Correlation score + multi-vector same peer — meta but actionable
